title: Ohio Voter Registration Analysis
description: Voter registration analysis for {county}. Use the County dropdown and Geography filter to focus the charts below.
dataNote: Data sourced from Ohio Secretary of State statewide voter file. Last updated 2026-05-01.

sections.title: Voter Age Distribution by Birth Decade
sections.description: Count of registered voters grouped by birth decade. Produced by the Decade Summary sheet in voter_data_cleaner.py.

sections.title: Party Affiliation Breakdown
sections.description: Distribution of registered voters by party affiliation. Includes Democratic, Republican, Nonpartisan, and minor parties.

sections.title: Party Affiliation by Birth Decade
sections.description: Side-by-side view of party affiliation within each birth decade cohort.

sections.title: Registration by Precinct
sections.description: Precinct-level active and inactive voter counts with estimated unregistered adult residents.

sections.title: Voter Age Distribution by Birth Decade
sections.description: Count of registered voters grouped by birth decade.

sections.title: Party Affiliation Breakdown
sections.description: Distribution of registered voters by party affiliation.

sections.title: Party Affiliation by Birth Decade
sections.description: Party affiliation within each birth decade cohort.

sections.title: Registration by Precinct
sections.description: Precinct-level active and confirmation voter counts.
